reviews.review_description:
I won this game on SideQuest and started to play this game yesterday. Before I knew, I was playing it 3 hours nonstop ! Its a bit addicting. I like the gameflow of collecting things to continue to other levels.

One tiny thing : The monsters could be a bit more dangerous.... in the current game, the fights are almost non-existent. It would be cool, if the developer gives an option in the menu to raise the difficulty (for children / adults) of the monsters.

Overall, a nice game.

reviews.review_title: Fun at first, boring at the end
reviews.review_description: Its a very short game, some regions ro explore, all enemies die with one slash (yes, kinda boring, you can even throw your blade to one hit kill everything). The resources you collect serves just to reveal the world, there is no limit for numbers of resources and there is no logical in it (you spent blue gems to build a log bridge). There is no use in transforming the resources that you collect (like transform log into planks). At first glance i thought it was a minecraft game, at the end seens like One Punch Man take a sword for a pick and its riding the world. Its not a rpg. Boring as it seens. For me, this unfinished game was meant to be a base for something more, a source for something that doesnt exist yet. It wasn't worthy buying. I dont recommended buying till the game is done. (Jan,8,2024)
game play is about 3-4 hours and its fun the entire time

Love it! It's so chilled and different, idc if enemies are easy to kill or if you have to keep grinding for resources, the game is great fun and I just discovered I have a cannon ball gun on my sword hand! So can farm resources from afar. I would love to have a multiplayer mode to grind with friends. I would also like more than 1 save slot because I share my headset.. You can literally just play and lose track of time with this one 🙂

I'll start by saying that it's not my kind of game, but this one is spectacular, it amuses you and excites you level after level, you're active in taking total and beautiful weapons, absolutely worth buying

This is a very underrated game. It is a very fun game for when you just wanna chill. I haven’t played much but if you are wondering if you should play this definitely buy it. It was worth the 6 bucks.

In my opinion it is the best game I have played on vr yet it has pretty good graphics and like that you have to upgrade your sword and the little gun that let's you buy more land with the materials that you have is pretty cool

You have to constantly farm for resources and it gets pretty boring after a while

That being said there is a suggestion, instead of people constantly farming just to reveal the world, how about you add a creative mode where other people get to design their own world, adding their own enemies with their, but you will need a resources in order to create the world you want to make.

This will add more variety to the game and allow other people to try out different maps  and see what others have made for them, they can be dungeons they can be towns they can be ruins they can be whatever.
